reviews.comment:
Cómodo, bien atendido, agradable para todas las actividades que uno precisa de un centro de servicios. 'Como siempre un riquísimo café con leche y cosas caseras para acompañar un alto en el  caminl. El placer de pertenecer a este club

(Translated by Google)
Comfortable, well-run, and pleasant for all the activities one needs from a service center. As always, delicious coffee with milk and homemade treats to accompany a break along the way. The pleasure of belonging to this club.
